title: Code module chat: docked panel, streaming markdown, beautiful diagrams (MVP)

steps.description: API: SSE wire format — base64 tokens, named events (token/citation/done/error), citation payload schema, multipart image 501-stub
Frontend: docked right panel + resize + localStorage + Cmd+\ + drawer fallback + scroll + keyboard + image paste chip + slash menu + SSE client stream parser (rendering hooks as TODO)
Code review: S03 (layout / scroll / composer / keyboard / image paste)
Frontend: vendored markdown pipeline (Streamdown or streaming-markdown+DOMPurify+Highlight.js) + code/table/citation partials + per-message actions + vendor LICENSES.md
Code review: S05 (rich content rendering + sanitization + vendoring + licenses)
Frontend: Mermaid vendored + ELK loader + themeVariables from iw-brand-config + sandboxed iframe + parse-validate + failure chip with retry
Code review: S07 (Mermaid ELK + brand + sandbox + license compliance)
Tests: SSE wire format, Jinja partial render, accessibility, security, license assertions, and Playwright browser smoke
Code review: S09 (test coverage vs. acceptance criteria)
Final cross-agent review: contract seams, sanitization end-to-end, licenses, accessibility, AC coverage
Fix CRITICAL and HIGH findings from S11
QV: Browser verification — verify change end-to-end in isolated worktree stack
